steps.title: Identify the key finding
steps.content: The passage shows that EBF repels mosquitoes by activating Or31, a single receptor present in all disease-carrying mosquito species.

steps.title: Complete the logical next step
steps.content:
To develop new repellents that achieve EBF's success, researchers should identify other molecular components that target Or31 as well.

Choice A directly states this approach. Choices B, C, and D address extraction methods, anatomical verification, and receptor limits—none of which follow from this finding.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
